utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding keys. Now check if each is fully specified with details and costs: 1) health_coverage: specifies physical and mental health insurance with named plan(s) and individual costs (€100, €65, €75) and total cost (€240/month). Meets requirement of physical and mental health insurance with costs. 2) property_coverage: states home/contents insurance including photography equipment and provides a cost (€60/month). Satisfies home/contents with costs. 3) travel_coverage: states travel insurance with premium medical limits and concierge services and provides a cost (€50/month). Costs included; coverage type indicated. 4) additional_services: lists two enhancement services with individual costs and total cost (€90/month). 5) total_budget: gives monthly and annual cost breakdown (€440/month, €5280/year). All items are present and include the required details and costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists specific LifeFirst items: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health, LifeFirst Standard Plan for mental health, LifeFirst Standard Coverage for home content protection, and LifeFirst Standard Plan under Travel Insurance. It also mentions a Holistic Wellness Add-on, Photography Specialist Endorsement, and Adventure Activity Endorsement, but these do not have direct counterparts with ratings in the ground truth; therefore, only the items that match exactly named options in the ground-truth ratings are mapped. Their ratings are retrieved from the corresponding sections: primary_health_coverage (physical_health and mental_health), property_protection (home_content), and mobility_coverage (travel_insurance).
